name: tag-team-llm
description: Put Claude Code and GitHub Copilot in structured debate to break the guess-patch-repeat loop on complex codebases.

chatParticipants.name: tag-team
chatParticipants.description: Two LLMs debate a root cause before any edit. Try: @tag-team why does login hang on refresh?

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Apply the agreed change set via Claude after a checkpoint

commands.name: auto-resolve
commands.description: Debate and auto-apply if both models agree on the root cause

commands.name: again
commands.description: Run another debate round on the same problem

tagTeam.claudePath.description: Path to the Claude Code CLI binary. Use an absolute path if `claude` is not on the PATH that VS Code sees (e.g. ~/.claude/local/claude).

tagTeam.claudeModel.description: Optional Claude model override passed to `claude -p --model`. Leave blank to use the CLI default.

tagTeam.copilotFamily.description: Copilot model family requested via vscode.lm.selectChatModels (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, o1).

tagTeam.turnCap.description: Maximum debate rounds before forcing a human checkpoint.

tagTeam.autoResolve.description: When true, Claude automatically applies the agreed change as soon as both models converge on a root cause — no approval prompt. If they never converge, you still decide.

tagTeam.claudeTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for a single Claude headless turn.
